blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,455 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
